course.title: Harmony Course
course.subtitle: Free classical harmony course

contact.title: Contact
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.

hero.description:
Artificial intelligence is transforming music.
Those who master traditional harmony will have the advantage.
Immerse yourself in the tradition of Shostakovich and the Moscow Conservatory,
contrast your works with the Virtual Teacher and develop a truly professional ear.

features.description: A complete ecosystem: classical theory, ear training, and intelligent feedback.

course.title: Traditional Harmony Course
course.description: The Shostakovich-Medrano-Cárdenas method: harmony and analysis, harmonic vocal quartet. 60+ lessons, completely free.

apps.title: 10 Educational Apps
apps.description: Free app suite on the website and for Android: mental math, memory and total ear training.

virtualTeacher.title: Virtual Teacher
virtualTeacher.description: Write your assignment as a midi file in our sequencer and the Virtual Teacher will guide you toward perfection.

book.title: The Musical Beings
book.description: The book that shares the principles upon which this teaching method is developed.

cta.description: Full free access. New lessons, tools, and publications will keep appearing here over time.

growth.description: You can already explore the course, the apps, and the method, but this space will keep evolving with new lessons, tools, and content. The goal is not to apologize for being unfinished. It is to invite visitors to follow the process and discover each new step as it arrives.

available.title: Start with what is already here
available.description: The course, the apps, and the core materials are already ready to be explored today.

building.title: New resources are on the way
building.description: More lessons, music tools, and interactive experiences will keep being published as the project grows.

return.title: Each visit may bring something new
return.description: Check back regularly for fresh posts, improvements, and upcoming stages of Storm Studios Learning.

growth.footer: If this project resonates with you, come back soon. Storm Studios Learning is being built in public, step by step.

website.name: Storm Studios Learning
website.description: Learn music harmony with artificial intelligence — courses, apps and virtual teacher
